title: Compression ores
description: Compress ores to make them more advanced!!
body:
# Compression ores
*Compress ores to make them more advanced!!*

![ICON](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.ibb.co/Gch29t4/222.png&n=-1)

## Features

- A brand new machine that uses magma to drive compressed objects
- Transform basic materials through compression and even create new uses
- Reduce the collection time of rare resources
- Use resources to upgrade magma to multiply the products
- Use magma level average calculation to reduce resource consumption
- Accept redstone signals and build your own compression factory!

## Recipes

![compression1](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.ibb.co/Kmx1kJh/11.png&n=-1)
![compression2](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.ibb.co/cw7Rbc2/12.png&n=-1)

| Materials (10 required)             | Product (quantity = average magma level)               |
|---------------------|---------------------|
| Cobblestone/Stone | Iron ingot |
| Iron ingot | Gold ingot |
| Gold ingot | Diamond |
| Coal/charcoal | Diamond |
| Diamond | Netherite ingot |
| Netherite ingot | Nether star |
| Redstone | Lapis |
| Lapis | Emerald |
| Emerald | Bottle o' enchanting |
| Bottle o' enchanting | Mending enchanted Book |
| Dirt | Quartz |
| Sand | Prismarine shard |
| Prismarine shard | Prismarine crystal |
| Prismarine crystal | Heart of the sea |
| Heart of the sea | Silk touch enchanted Book |
| End Stone | Chorus Fruit |
| Chorus Fruit | Dragon head |
| Dragon head | Dragon Egg |
| Purpur Block | Shulker Shell |

## Achievement list

![compressor](https://wsrv.nl/?url=https://i.ibb.co/2h0g97M/9.png&n=-1)

<details>
<summary>Open!</summary>

**First Try**
do your first compression!!\
**Hardened Stone**
Through compressor to make a Iron ingot\
**Gilded!**
Through compressor to make a Gold ingot\
**Artificial Diamond!**
Through compressor to make a Diamond\
**Save time and effort...?**
Through compressor to make a Netherite ingot!\
**Compressed to the extreme!!!**
Through compressor to make a nether star!!\
**2x!!**
make can give 2x item Lava!\
**3x!!**
make can give 3x item Lava!\
**4x!!**
make can give 4x item Lava!\
**5x!!**
make can give 5x item Lava!\
**562599527(x x!!**
make can give 6x item Lava!

</details>

## More Info

Feel free to add this mod to your modpack :D
